## Validation

- [ ] `npm audit --audit-level=low`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:unit`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`

## Security

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, credentials, or private data were committed.
- [ ] New dependencies are necessary and reviewed.
- [ ] User-facing data remains non-authoritative when sourced from ESPN.
- [ ] License and copyright notices remain intact.
